entries.prompt_text: Delete the extra page break at the end of the document
Remove the page break after {title} that pushes content down
Remove the unnecessary section break in the middle of {introduction}
Delete the stray column break before {Findings} heading
Remove the manual page break between {Executive Summary} and {Findings}
Delete the extra section break above the {footer block}
Remove the page break that creates a blank bottom half
Delete the continuous section break inside {callout box}
Remove the column break that splits {bullet list} across columns
Delete the section break between {Recommendations} and {Conclusions}
Remove the hidden page break pushing {signature block} to the bottom
Delete the extra blank paragraph acting as a break above {chart}
Remove the manual break that creates a gap between {table} and its caption
Delete the section break that resets margins in the middle of body text
Remove the page break inserted before {References} section
Reduce body text to {10pt} to fit all content on one page
Tighten line spacing to {1.0} to pull overflow text back onto one page
Reduce paragraph after-spacing to {3pt} to reclaim vertical space
Shrink all margins to {0.5 inches} to fit the wide {table}
Remove the {3 blank paragraphs} between {title block} and body to reclaim space
Reduce {chart} height to {2.5 inches} to leave room for the closing paragraph
Reduce section heading spacing from {18pt} to {12pt} above to save vertical space
Shrink {image} to {3 inches} wide to fit beside the body text
Reduce {table} font size to {9pt} so all rows fit without overflow
Remove the empty row at the bottom of {Table 1} to save space
Reduce {title} size from {24pt} to {18pt} to reclaim header space
Collapse the {two-column layout} to single column to fit all text
Reduce top margin to {0.5 inches} to fit the overflowing content
Tighten {bullet list} spacing to {2pt} after each item to save {4 lines}
Reduce {callout box} padding to {4pt} on all sides to save space
Pull the {2 lines} of overflow text back onto one page by tightening line spacing to {1.0}
Cut the {last sentence} in {conclusion} that overflows to a second page
Shrink {table} row height to {auto} so it does not push the footer off the page
Move {chart} above {body text} so the closing section fits on one page
Reduce {sidebar} width to {2 inches} so body text wraps tighter and fits
Remove the {3rd bullet} from {Recommendations} list to prevent overflow
Reduce bottom margin to {0.5 inches} to pull the last paragraph back on the page
Switch {bullet list} from full sentences to {short phrases} to save vertical space
Merge the {two short paragraphs} in {intro} into one to save {3 lines}
Reduce {image} height to {2 inches} to prevent it from pushing text off the page
Remove the blank line between {heading} and first paragraph to reclaim space
Shrink {callout box} text to {9pt} to prevent it from pushing content below the fold
Reduce {KPI box} height to {0.75 inches} each to fit all four in one row
Remove the duplicate {source line} under {chart} to reclaim a line of space
Tighten space above {footer block} to {6pt} to pull content back onto one page
Keep {Findings} heading with its first paragraph — do not let them split
Keep {Table 1} and its caption together as one block
Keep {chart} and its {title} together — do not separate them
Keep the {signature block} as one unit — do not split name, title, and date
Keep {callout box} content together — do not let it split across columns
Keep {bullet list} under {Recommendations} together with its heading
Keep {Figure 1} and its {source line} together as one block
Keep {KPI box} label and value on the same line
Keep {footnote block} together at the bottom — do not let footnotes split
Keep {address block} lines together in the header
Keep {disclaimer paragraph} together at the bottom — do not let it split
Keep {table header row} attached to the first data row
Keep {subtitle} on the same line or directly below {title}
Keep {author name} and {date} on the same line in the header
Keep {sidebar} heading with its body text — do not separate them
Move {Executive Summary} above {Findings} so it reads first
Move {chart} directly below the paragraph that references it
Move {Table 1} above {Recommendations} so data appears before the analysis
Move {source line} directly below {Figure 1}
Move {callout box} next to the paragraph that references it
Move {Conclusions} section to the bottom, below {Recommendations}
Move {legend} directly below {chart} instead of to the right
Move {footnotes} to the bottom of the layout, below all body text
Move {sidebar} to the right column so body text reads left-to-right first
Move {disclaimer} below {signature block} as the last element
Move {Methods} section above {Results} so the flow is chronological
Move {title block} to the top of the layout above the body
Move {KPI boxes} above {body text} so the key numbers appear first
Move the {data source note} from the header to directly below {Table 1}
Move {image} from below the fold to directly below {title block}
Distribute the blank space evenly between sections instead of lumping it at the bottom
Remove the large blank gap between {chart} and {next section}
Fill the blank space at the bottom by increasing section spacing to {18pt}
Remove the blank space between {title block} and {first section} by reducing it to {12pt}
Remove the {6 blank lines} between {sidebar} and body text
Add {12pt} of space between each section to use the blank bottom quarter
Remove the empty text box creating blank space in the middle of the layout
Increase {chart} height to {3.5 inches} to fill the unused space below it
Expand {image} to {4 inches} wide to fill the blank right side
Remove the {5 blank paragraphs} at the end of the document
Add {6pt} extra space above and below each section heading to distribute the blank space
Increase line spacing to {1.15} to fill the blank bottom third
Remove the blank gap above {footer block} by pulling it up to {12pt} below the last section
Increase {callout box} padding to {10pt} to use the blank space inside it
Add a {divider line} in the blank space between {Findings} and {Recommendations}
